# Jersey Mike's Subs — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Jersey Mike's Subs is a well-known sub sandwich chain with a new location opening soon at 105 Erie Blvd W, Rome, NY 13440. The brand is centered around freshly made submarine sandwiches and casual dining, offering subs, sandwiches, and soda. The site has a 'coming soon' purpose, building anticipation for the grand opening of this new local franchise.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://jersey-mike-s-subs.zappy5.app
Get ready, Rome! Jersey Mike&#39;s Subs is opening soon at 105 Erie Blvd W with authentic fresh-sliced subs and bold flavors. Sign up for exclusive grand opening deals and coupons today!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://jersey-mike-s-subs.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://jersey-mike-s-subs.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Jersey Mike's Subs
Jersey Mike's Subs is a well-known sub sandwich chain with a new location opening soon at 105 Erie Blvd W, Rome, NY 13440. The brand is centered around freshly made submarine sandwiches and casual dining, offering subs, sandwiches, and soda. The site has a 'coming soon' purpose, building anticipation for the grand opening of this new local franchise.

## Services/Products
- Subs
- Sandwiches
- Soda

## Target Audience
- Local Office Workers
- College Students
- Lunchtime Fitness Enthusiasts

## Industry
Restaurant

- Robots: https://jersey-mike-s-subs.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://jersey-mike-s-subs.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
